codeReview.summary: The tools-registry feature was already fully implemented prior to the worker session. The commit 491e98c only contained a minor clippy fix (removing unused mut). The ToolRegistry in registry.rs correctly implements register(), get(), list() methods with MCP-compatible schemas via the Tool trait's input_schema() method. All verification steps pass.

summary: PASS - The tools-registry feature is fully implemented. ToolRegistry with register/get/list methods, MCP-compatible schemas, and tool discovery capability all work correctly. Worker correctly identified existing implementation and verified it passes all tests (cargo build --workspace, cargo test -p swell-tools -- registry with 2 tests, cargo test -p swell-tools with 20 tests, cargo clippy with no warnings).
